hero.title: Nucleous — AI-Driven CRM & Workforce Intelligence Platform
hero.description: Nucleous is an AI-powered CRM designed to manage leads, funnels, teams, and follow-ups in one unified system. From cold leads to closed deals, Nucleous helps businesses track, automate, and scale their entire lead development workflow with precision and speed.
hero.imageAlt: Nucleous AI CRM dashboard showcasing lead funnels and analytics

features.title: Why Businesses Choose Nucleous
features.description: Nucleous combines AI automation, funnel-based CRM, and workforce intelligence to give teams complete operational control and visibility.

items.title: Funnel-Based Lead Management
items.description: Organize every lead into structured pipelines and funnels. Track progress across stages, teams, and ownership from first contact to deal closure.

items.title: AI-Driven Follow-Ups
items.description: Automate intelligent follow-ups via email and WhatsApp. Nucleous AI adapts messaging and timing based on lead behavior and engagement history.

items.title: Smart Quotation Builder
items.description: Create professional quotations in minutes using configurable products and services. Reduce errors, speed up negotiations, and close deals faster.

items.title: Workforce Productivity Tracking
items.description: Monitor shifts, breaks, activity levels, and average handling time. Improve productivity with real-time insights instead of manual supervision.

items.title: Enterprise Admin Control
items.description: Manage large teams from a single dashboard. Assign leads, control feature access, manage funnels, and enforce role-based permissions.

items.title: AI-Powered Analytics & Reporting
items.description: Gain actionable insights into conversion rates, lead aging, team performance, and funnel efficiency with AI-driven analytics.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Modern Lead Teams
testimonials.description: Teams across industries rely on Nucleous to streamline operations and increase conversions.

items.quote: Nucleous completely transformed how we manage leads and teams. The AI follow-ups alone helped us close deals faster without increasing headcount.
Managing multiple teams and funnels became effortless with Nucleous. Everything from analytics to quotations is now in one place.
The combination of CRM and workforce tracking is what sets Nucleous apart. It gives full visibility without micromanagement.

cta.title: Run Your Leads and Teams on One Platform
cta.description: Start managing leads, funnels, teams, and follow-ups smarter with Nucleous. No complexity, just complete control.
